# Reading List — Map of Content

A tiny map-of-content note whose whole job is to link to a sibling file whose
name contains spaces. Both this folder ("reading list") and the target file
have spaces in their names, so the link destination is percent-encoded — this
is the case that silently broke intra-engram navigation.

## Books

- [Wildflowers of the Midwest](Wildflowers%20of%20the%20Midwest.md) — the
  encoded-space link. Clicking it in preview should open the note.

For contrast, a link with no spaces to exercise the ordinary path:

- [Field notebook home](../index.md)
